summary: A light localization plan focusing on adding contextual text overlays and maximizing the ASMR audio to appeal to the US oddly satisfying and cottagecore niches.
suggested_new_caption: The sound of the bamboo peeling is so satisfying 🔊 Wait for the perfect fit at the end!

actions.action: Add a brief, fading text overlay at the very beginning (0:00-0:03) that says 'Making a zero-waste cup from scratch 🎋🔊'.
actions.rationale: US TikTok audiences typically expect immediate context. A text hook tells them what to expect without ruining the cinematic, slow-living vibe.

actions.action: Keep the original ASMR audio (scraping and cutting sounds) mixed prominently. If adding a trending background track, set its volume to 5-10% maximum.
actions.rationale: The raw, satisfying audio of the tools on the bamboo is the primary driver of engagement for the ASMR and oddly satisfying communities.

actions.action: Replace the original creator-focused hashtags with niche-specific tags like #oddlysatisfying and #cottagecore.
actions.rationale: Shifts the discoverability from creator-recognition (which may be lower in the US mainstream) to highly engaged, established aesthetic communities.

actions.action: Maintain the exact 14-second duration and current pacing; do not add an intro or outro.
actions.rationale: The short duration naturally encourages looping and high completion rates, which are critical for algorithmic distribution.
